name: Seychelles Polytechnic
description: Seychelles Polytechnic is a government-owned tertiary institution located in Anse Royale, Mahé. The institution currently offer three programme areas in Business & Secretarial Studies, Visual Arts and the Manchester Twinning Programme, a first-year degree programme obtained in partnership with the University of Manchester.

name: University of Seychelles
description: The University of Seychelles, informally also called UniSey, is the primary institution of higher education in Seychelles.
